title_original: Infleqtion and Churchill Capital Corp X Complete Business Combination
summary_original: Infleqtion, Inc., a global company specializing in quantum sensing and computing powered by neutral-atom technology, has completed its business combination with Churchill Capital Corp X. As a result, Infleqtion will become the first publicly listed neutral-atom quantum technology company and will begin trading on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker “INFQ” on February 17, 2026. Infleqtion provides quantum computers, clocks, radio frequency receivers, and inertial sensors to organizations including the United States Department of War, NASA, and the United Kingdom government. The company’s approach integrates both quantum computing and precision sensing within a single product architecture, positioning it as a commercial leader in these domains according to the provided information.
